content:
Every skill check they take has a randomized outcome, even if they succeed.
Cannot make long-term strategic plans.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Introduces narrative depth and mirrors classic chaotic characters in literature.
✔ Creates tension and strategy—players must decide whether to work with or against them.
✔ Prevents static gameplay—even well-planned strategies can be disrupted.

📜 2. Weekly Curses & Status Effects – Superstitions & Plagues

📜 Each week, one player is “cursed” and must operate under special conditions.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 324 (chunk 324/555)
